scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter @quayboard/shared test && pnpm --filter @quayboard/api test:unit && pnpm --filter @quayboard/web test && pnpm --filter @quayboard/mcp test
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --wait && pnpm db:migrate
